title: Feasibility, Alternatives, Risk Experiments, and Stop Decisions · Evidence Recall
summary: A delayed review reconstructs feasibility, alternatives, risk experiments, and stop decisions from stakeholder, decision, assumption, revision, artifact, observation, changed case, rejected failure, repair, owner, and residual-risk evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for feasibility proof and alternative decision record after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Inventory time, skill, access, authority, data, technology, service, policy, cost, support, and maintenance constraints with owners.
Compare build, buy, configure, integrate, simplify, manual service, policy change, partnership, and no-build alternatives.
Design the cheapest ethical experiment that distinguishes outcomes for the highest uncertainty and consequence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# capstone-project cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: capstone-project
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence · Review Stop Pivot Evidence
steps.instruction:
review case — The plan assumes unavailable data, participants, approval, services, expertise, operating budget, and time while rejecting no-build alternatives. The review variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Exercise a real stop, rescope, substitute, or pivot decision when evidence crosses a predeclared threshold.

Inspect the Stop Pivot Evidence trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Separate evidence from confidence · Review Stop Pivot Evidence.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for exercise a real stop, rescope, substitute, or pivot decision when evidence crosses a predeclared threshold. For Separate evidence from confidence · Review Stop Pivot Evidence, keep Stop Pivot Evidence connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: For Stop Pivot Evidence, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: For Separate evidence from confidence · Review Stop Pivot Evidence, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Stop Pivot Evidence precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Separate evidence from confidence · Review Stop Pivot Evidence, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: The plan assumes unavailable data, participants, approval, services, expertise, operating budget, and time while rejecting no-build alternatives. The review variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Exercise a real stop, rescope, substitute, or pivot decision when evidence crosses a predeclared threshold.

For Separate evidence from confidence · Review Stop Pivot Evidence, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Persistence despite disconfirming evidence demonstrates capstone excellence.

stimulus.title: Stop Pivot Evidence case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: The plan assumes unavailable data, participants, approval, services, expertise, operating budget, and time while rejecting no-build alternatives. lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Exercise a real stop, rescope, substitute, or pivot decision when evidence crosses a predeclared threshold. Artifact under review: feasibility proof and alternative decision record.

options.text: The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Stop Pivot Evidence, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

Order the Constraint Inventory evidence cycle for this review task before implementing it.

steps.title: Record what required effort · Review Stop Pivot Evidence
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Stop Pivot Evidence: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — The plan assumes unavailable data, participants, approval, services, expertise, operating budget, and time while rejecting no-build alternatives. The review variation 5 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Exercise a real stop, rescope, substitute, or pivot decision when evidence crosses a predeclared threshold.

Evidence target: Record what required effort · Review Stop Pivot Evidence.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For Record what required effort · Review Stop Pivot Evidence, keep Stop Pivot Evidence connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Exercise a real stop, rescope, substitute, or pivot decision when evidence crosses a predeclared threshold.
